name: Balsamic Marinated Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Cut the onions in half and peel off the outer layer of skin. Slice thinly.
3. Toss the sliced onions in a medium-size pan with olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, and pepper.
4. Cover the pan tightly and bake for about 45 minutes, or until the onions are tender.
5. Stir in the capers and season to taste with additional salt and pepper.
Yields about 2 cups
Per tablespoon: 15 calories, 0 g protein, 2 g carbohydrate, 0 g fat, 0 mg cholesterol, 72 mg sodium, 0 g fiber.
